caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap is seated behind a desk, participating in a card-breaking event. The scene is filled with numerous boxes labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" in large white and red text, stacked haphazardly across the table. A large red and white logo featuring the text "CASEBREAKS." spans the bottom of the screen. In the upper right corner, a small circular logo for "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible. A hand enters the frame from the top left, interacting with the boxes and moving a small red die across the surface. As the sequence progresses, the hand retracts, and the man is seen speaking while gesturing with his hands. The background is blurred, keeping the focus on the merchandise and the presenter, while the overall composition emphasizes the commercial nature of the card-breaking activity.
